title: Just Treats Fried Eggs Gift Jar
features: Egg-cellent Flavour: These chewy eggs are sweet, soft and full of charm.
Retro Rewind: A classic pick ’n’ mix favourite brought back in full form.
Dietary Friendly: Halal and gluten-free for guilt-free munching any time.
An ideal size for solo indulgence or sharing with a close friend.
Jarred to Impress: Comes in a screw-top jar to keep each ‘egg’ as fresh as the last.
description: Product description Just Treats Fried Eggs Gift Jar Enjoy a fun and fruity treat with Just Treats Fried Eggs Gift Jar ! These colourful, jelly-like sweets shaped like fried eggs are made with natural fruit and vegetable juices, offering a chewy and playful confection. Packaged in a reusable jar , it’s a great gift or treat for any celebration. Bright, fun fried egg-shaped jellies with fruity flavours Made with natural fruit and vegetable juice concentrates Reusable jar – ideal for gifting or storage Chewy and vibrant for added enjoyment Perfect for parties and treats Storage: Store in a cool, dry place. Seal the jar to keep sweets fresh and tasty. Perfect For: Gifting | Celebrations | Fun Snacks | Any Occasion Ingredients glucose syrup, sugar, modified corn starch, beef gelatine, acidity regulator (citric acid), flavouring, colourings (titanium dioxide, allura red, sunset yellow), palm oil, glazing agents (carnauba wax, bees wax).
